text: 🇮🇷 Approaching the Strait of Hormuz with military vessels will be considered a violation of the ceasefire. - IRGC In its 59th official statement, the Public Relations office of Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) Navy rejected what it described as false claims by hostile officials, affirming that the Strait of Hormuz remains open and securely managed. Civilian shipping continues to pass through under established safety regulations without disruption. However, the IRGC Navy made clear that any military vessel attempting to approach the Strait—under any pretext—will be treated as breaching the ceasefire and will face a decisive and forceful response. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）：任何携带军用舰艇接近霍尔木兹海峡的行为都将被视为违反停火协议。在第59份官方声明中，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军公共关系办公室驳斥了其所称的敌对官员的虚假指控，并重申霍尔木兹海峡保持开放并处于安全管理之下。民用航运继续在既定的安全法规下通行，未受干扰。然而，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军明确表示，任何试图以任何借口接近海峡的军用舰艇都将被视为违反停火协议，并将面临果断而强有力的回应。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, Defence Minister Katz and the IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir held a security situation assessment inside Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu visited southern Lebanon with the Israeli defense minister Israel Katz and IDF chief of staff Eyal Zamir, stating that “the war continues, including inside the security zone in Lebanon.” He said Israel has thwarted the threat of invasion from Lebanon and is pushing back anti‑tank fire and rockets, but more work remains. “Our enemies – Iran and the axis of evil – came to destroy us, and now they are simply fighting for their survival. We have changed the face of the Middle East.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡、国防部长卡茨和以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔在黎巴嫩境内进行了安全局势评估。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡与以色列国防部长伊斯雷尔·卡茨及以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔访问了黎巴嫩南部，并表示“战争仍在继续，包括在黎巴嫩境内的安全区内”。他称以色列已经挫败了来自黎巴嫩的入侵威胁，并正在击退反坦克火力和火箭弹袭击，但仍有更多工作要做。“我们的敌人——伊朗和邪恶轴心——曾试图摧毁我们，而现在他们只是在为生存而战。我们已经改变了中东的面貌。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇸🇪🇬🇺🇸🇮🇱 A Hamas delegation is holding talks in Cairo with Egyptian mediators and Nikolay Mladenov, the senior representative of the US‑backed Peace Council, to discuss the second phase of the Gaza ceasefire – including the disarmament of Hamas and the entry…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Talks in Cairo between mediators, US officials and Hamas on a disarmament plan are expected to continue this week, per Ynet. A U.S. official said a decision is expected within days: “We will know whether there is voluntary disarmament or by force.” The proposal envisions full disarmament over six to eight months, starting with heavy weapons and rocket production facilities, followed by tunnel destruction and surrender of small arms. Oversight would be provided by a combined Palestinian security and international stabilisation force, but the latter has been delayed due to the war with Iran. Approximately $7 billion in reconstruction pledges has been secured, but funds will not be released until disarmament begins – a condition Hamas rejects, citing it as one of the reasons it refuses to disarm. Some Hamas leaders view disarmament as surrender. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said on Saturday: “We will deal with it,” referring to Hamas. Israeli Army Radio noted that Netanyahu is preparing the ground for the next front – Hamas in Gaza – admitting that Hamas is far from being dismantled. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇸🇪🇬🇺🇸🇮🇱 一个哈马斯代表团正在开罗与埃及调解人及美国支持的和平委员会高级代表尼古拉·姆拉德诺夫进行会谈，讨论加沙停火的第二阶段——包括哈马斯的解除武装和进入……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 据《新消息报》（Ynet）报道，调解人、美国官员和哈马斯之间关于解除武装计划的开罗会谈预计将于本周继续进行。一位美国官员表示，预计几天内会有决定：“我们将知道是自愿解除武装还是被迫解除武装。”该提案设想在六到八个月内实现全面解除武装，首先是重型武器和火箭弹生产设施，随后是摧毁隧道和上缴轻武器。监督工作将由巴勒斯坦安全部队和国际稳定部队共同提供，但后者因与伊朗的战争而推迟。目前已获得约70亿美元的重建承诺，但在解除武装开始前资金不会发放——哈马斯拒绝了这一条件，称这是其拒绝解除武装的原因之一。一些哈马斯领导人将解除武装视为投降。以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡周六表示：“我们将处理它”，指的是哈马斯。以色列陆军电台指出，内塔尼亚胡正在为下一个战线——加沙的哈马斯——做准备，并承认哈马斯远未被瓦解。@wfwitness

text: Netanyahu visits Lebanese territory under Israeli occupation.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡访问以色列占领下的黎巴嫩领土。

text: Trump:
text_zh: 特朗普：

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 Egypt’s Foreign Minister Badr Abdelatty held a phone call with U.S. Special Envoy Steve Witkoff to discuss regional developments following U.S.-Iran talks in Islamabad. Witkoff briefed Egypt on the U.S. position during negotiations, while Abdelatty emphasized the importance of peaceful solutions to maintain regional stability. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 埃及外交部长巴德尔·阿卜杜勒阿提与美国特使史蒂夫·威特科夫通电话，讨论美伊伊斯兰堡会谈后的地区局势发展。威特科夫向埃及通报了美国在谈判中的立场，而阿卜杜勒阿提强调了和平解决方案对维护地区稳定的重要性。@wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 DroneBomber added that in the Moscow region, at least 11 drones crossed the Moscow Ring Road, passing approximately 113 air defense positions. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043368866558943598/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：🇷🇺 DroneBomber补充说，在莫斯科地区，至少有11架无人机越过了莫斯科环城公路，经过了大约113个防空阵地。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043368866558943598/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ According to Hungary’s election administration, voter turnout reached a high 74.23% by 17:00. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043368310524252472/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 据匈牙利选举管理部门称，截至17:00，投票率达到了74.23%的高位。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043368310524252472/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC Navy: Strait of Hormuz remains open for civilian vessels under "smart control". Military vessels approaching the strait will be considered ceasefire violation and met with "severe response" tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军：霍尔木兹海峡在“智能控制”下对民用船只保持开放。接近海峡的军用舰艇将被视为违反停火协议，并将遭到“严厉回应”。推文

text: Open Source Intel The IDF says it is continuing operations tied to October 7, hunting and eliminating several terrorists involved in hostage taking. Among those eliminated was a fighter linked to the kidnapping of Yair Goldberg-Polin, Alon Ahel, Elia Cohen, and Or Levi from the Migronit site in Re’im. Additional operatives who held Avinatan Or in captivity were also targeted and killed. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列国防军表示，正在继续进行与10月7日相关的行动，搜捕并消灭了几名参与劫持人质的恐怖分子。被消灭的人员中包括一名与从雷伊姆（Re’im）的Migronit地点绑架Yair Goldberg-Polin、Alon Ahel、Elia Cohen和Or Levi有关的武装分子。其他扣押Avinatan Or的武装人员也成为目标并被击毙。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 📊 The number of serious crimes committed by Russian servicemen returning from the so-called “special military operation” is sharply increasing. ▪️ In 2024, the total number of serious crimes in Russia reached 617,000 — the highest level in the past 14 years. ▪️ In 2022, the number of murders rose by 4%. ▪️ As of December 2025, returning fighters have killed or seriously injured at least 1,016 people. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231：🇷🇺 📊 从所谓的“特别军事行动”返回的俄罗斯军人所犯下的严重罪行数量正在急剧增加。▪️ 2024年，俄罗斯严重罪行总数达到61.7万起——为过去14年来的最高水平。▪️ 2022年，谋杀案数量上升了4%。▪️ 截至2025年12月，返回的战斗人员已杀害或重伤至少1016人。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW Wall Street Journal: Tehran still holds the capability to build a nuclear bomb. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）《华尔街日报》最新消息：德黑兰仍具备制造核弹的能力。推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards warn that any military vessels approaching the Strait of Hormuz will be treated as a ceasefire violation and met with a strong response. The U.S. must it clear that the Strait of Hormuz doesn’t belong to Iran. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）突发：伊朗革命卫队警告称，任何接近霍尔木兹海峡的军用舰艇都将被视为违反停火协议，并将遭到强力回应。美国必须明确，霍尔木兹海峡不属于伊朗。推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli Ambassador to UN Danny Danon: We have no beef with Lebanon. On the contrary, we want to see a thriving Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043364167432749227/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列驻联合国大使丹尼·达农：我们与黎巴嫩没有过节。相反，我们希望看到一个繁荣的黎巴嫩。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043364167432749227/video/1 推文

text: Instant News Alerts Israeli cabinet set to convene tonight at 8pm local time amid regional developments tweet
text_zh: 即时新闻快讯（Instant News Alerts）以色列内阁定于当地时间今晚8点召开会议，讨论地区局势发展。推文

text: Open Source Intel AXIOS: Key gaps in talks with Iran: • End all uranium enrichment • Dismantle remaining nuclear facilities • Transfer out highly enriched uranium • Halt funding to Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis • Fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz with no transit fees • Disagreement over how much frozen Iranian funds would be released tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）AXIOS：与伊朗谈判的关键分歧：• 停止所有铀浓缩 • 拆除剩余核设施 • 转移出高浓缩铀 • 停止资助哈马斯、真主党和胡塞武装 • 完全重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，不收取过境费 • 关于释放多少被冻结的伊朗资金存在分歧。推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli Ambassador to UN Danny Danon: President Trump spoke not only about the Iranians who are blocking the strait but also some of the countries that actually collaborate with them. I won't name names, but you have European countries that are paying top dollars, millions of dollars to the Iranian regime. If so I think when you speak about the closure of the strait, it should be clear that some of the countries cannot use the strait, it shouldn't be open to anyone. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列驻联合国大使丹尼·达农：特朗普总统不仅谈到了封锁海峡的伊朗人，还谈到了实际上与他们合作的一些国家。我不会点名，但有些欧洲国家正在向伊朗政权支付巨额资金，数百万美元。如果是这样，我认为当谈到海峡封锁时，应该明确某些国家不能使用该海峡，它不应该对任何人开放。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Iranian state news outlet Press TV, Iran has already started the process of reconstructing destroyed and damaged oil infrastructure, with a plan to reach 80% capacity in the next two months. Per Iran’s CEO of the National Iranian Oil Refining and Distribution Company, Mohammad Sadeq Azimifar, “Contractors have been mobilized, and restoration work is already in progress.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据伊朗国家新闻媒体Press TV报道，伊朗已经开始重建被毁和受损的石油基础设施，计划在未来两个月内达到80%的产能。据伊朗国家炼油和分销公司首席执行官穆罕默德·萨德格·阿齐米法尔称，“承包商已经动员起来，修复工作正在进行中。”推文

text: 🇺🇸 A U.S. Air Force KC-135 tanker in the UK before returning to the United States. Dozens of patched impact holes are visible across the aircraft, reportedly from an Iranian strike on an airbase in Saudi Arabia. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 一架美国空军KC-135加油机在返回美国前停留在英国。飞机上可见数十个修补过的弹孔，据报道是伊朗对沙特阿拉伯一个空军基地进行打击造成的。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ❗️ Trump admits he has no other cards left but bombing civilian infrastructure: “The only thing left really is their water, which would be very devastating to hit.” I would hate to do it, but it’s their water, their desalination plants, and their electric generating plants. “We could have them all down. And I mean down, like you couldn’t have electricity for ten years…” You’d probably never be able to build them again. “I think we pretty much maxed out, other than those few items.“
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ❗️ 特朗普承认他除了轰炸民用基础设施外别无他法：“唯一剩下的就是他们的水，打击这些将是非常毁灭性的。”我不想这样做，但那是他们的水、他们的海水淡化厂和他们的发电厂。“我们可以把它们全部摧毁。我的意思是摧毁，就像你十年都用不上电一样……”你可能永远无法重建它们。“我认为除了那几项之外，我们基本上已经到了极限。”

text: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇧🇪 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇸🇾 The 32nd meeting of the Kurdistan National Congress Diplomatic Committee was held in Brussels, with representatives from 23 Kurdish parties and institutions. A moment of silence was observed for those who died in the struggle for freedom. KNK Executive Council representative Zubeir Aydar said the process initiated by Abdullah Öcalan has reached an important stage and needs a legal basis. “Iran is significantly weakened; we must prepare well,” he added. Co‑chair Ahmed Karamus called for a unified national structure for all Kurds, stating that Ankara’s policy remains based on hostility. “Strengthening the alliance between Kurds in eastern Kurdistan is very important,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇧🇪 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇸🇾 库尔德斯坦全国代表大会外交委员会第32次会议在布鲁塞尔举行，来自23个库尔德政党和机构的代表出席了会议。与会者为在争取自由斗争中牺牲的人们默哀。库尔德斯坦全国代表大会执行委员会代表祖贝尔·艾达尔表示，阿卜杜拉·奥贾兰发起的进程已达到重要阶段，需要法律基础。“伊朗已显著削弱；我们必须做好准备，”他补充道。联合主席艾哈迈德·卡拉穆斯呼吁为所有库尔德人建立统一的民族结构，并表示安卡拉的政策仍然基于敌意。“加强东库尔德斯坦库尔德人之间的联盟非常重要，”他说。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 IRGC Navy (Announcement No. 59): Contrary to enemy claims, the Strait of Hormuz remains under full control and open to civilian vessels under regulations. Any military vessel approaching under any pretext will be deemed a ceasefire violation and dealt with harshly and decisively.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军（第59号公告）：与敌人的说法相反，霍尔木兹海峡仍处于完全控制之下，并根据法规对民用船只开放。任何以任何借口接近的军用舰艇都将被视为违反停火协议，并将受到严厉和果断的处理。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The IRGC warned that they will consider any U.S. military vessel approaching the Strait of Hormuz a ceasefire violation. “The Navy of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps declares that contrary to the false claims of some enemy officials, the Strait of Hormuz is under intelligent control and management, open for the safe passage of non-military vessels under specific regulations, and any military vessels attempting to approach the Strait of Hormuz under any pretext or excuse will be considered a violation of the ceasefire and will be dealt with harshly and decisively.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队警告称，他们将把任何接近霍尔木兹海峡的美国军用舰艇视为违反停火协议。“伊斯兰革命卫队海军声明，与一些敌方官员的虚假说法相反，霍尔木兹海峡处于智能控制和管理之下，在特定法规下对非军用船只的安全通行开放，任何试图以任何借口或理由接近霍尔木兹海峡的军用舰艇都将被视为违反停火协议，并将受到严厉和果断的处理。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Seyed Mohammad Marandi in Islamabad, where Iran–US negotiations collapsed, explains the reasons for the failure and warns a return to war is likely. He also notes US media is already airing threats against Iran’s leadership and delegation. Marandi is a Tehran University professor and former advisor to Iran’s nuclear negotiation team. (Recorded 12 April 2026)
text_zh: 🇮🇷 赛义德·穆罕默德·马兰迪在伊斯兰堡（伊朗与美国谈判破裂之地）解释了失败的原因，并警告称战争很可能会卷土重来。他还指出，美国媒体已经在播放针对伊朗领导层和代表团的威胁。马兰迪是德黑兰大学教授，也是伊朗核谈判团队的前顾问。（录制于2026年4月12日）

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios: A U.S. official lists the gaps between the U.S. and Iran after negotiations in Islamabad: Freezing uranium enrichment in Iran Removing the enriched uranium from the country Dismantling the main uranium enrichment facilities (which are anyway Russian) The scope of unfreezing Iranian funds The date when the Strait of Hormuz will fully reopen and the cancellation of passage fees A regional security agreement and cessation of funding for terrorist organizations They continued on to list the U.S.’s red lines in negotiations: Ending all uranium enrichment Dismantle all major nuclear enrichment facilities (which are mostly destroyed) Retrieve highly enriched uranium Accept a broader peace, security and de-escalation framework that includes regional allies End funding for terrorist proxies Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis Fully open the Strait of Hormuz, charging no tolls for passage One gap in the talks was the amount of Iranian frozen funds that will be released, per source with knowledge @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：一位美国官员列出了伊斯兰堡谈判后美国与伊朗之间的分歧：冻结伊朗的铀浓缩；将浓缩铀运出该国；拆除主要的铀浓缩设施（无论如何这些设施都是俄罗斯的）；解冻伊朗资金的范围；霍尔木兹海峡完全重新开放和取消过境费的日期；区域安全协议和停止资助恐怖组织。他们继续列出了美国在谈判中的红线：结束所有铀浓缩；拆除所有主要的核浓缩设施（大部分已被摧毁）；收回高浓缩铀；接受一个更广泛的和平、安全和去升级框架，包括区域盟友；结束对恐怖主义代理人哈马斯、真主党和胡塞武装的资助；完全开放霍尔木兹海峡，通行不收取过境费。据知情人士透露，谈判的一个分歧是将被释放的伊朗被冻结资金的数额。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Israeli forces have targeted a alleged Hamas cell that posed a alleged threat to troops in the central Gaza Strip. The strike killed a alleged Hamas member who allegedly took part in the capture of Hersh Goldberg‑Polin, Alon Ohel, Eliya Cohen and Or Levi from the Re’im shelter. Additional fighters who held Avinatan Or were also eliminated. The IDF has released a photo of Muhammad Fuad Ghaser Sayid, a Hamas platoon commander, documented holding Avinatan Or inside a alleged Hamas tunnel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列军队针对一个据称对加沙地带中部部队构成威胁的哈马斯小组进行了打击。这次袭击击毙了一名据称参与了从雷伊姆避难所抓捕赫什·戈德堡-波林、阿隆·奥赫尔、埃利亚·科恩和奥尔·列维的哈马斯成员。其他扣押阿维纳坦·奥尔的武装人员也被消灭。以色列国防军发布了一张哈马斯排长穆罕默德·福阿德·加瑟·赛义德的照片，记录了他将阿维纳坦·奥尔扣押在据称是哈马斯隧道内的情况。@wfwitness

text: Key sticking points in US–Iran talks: Stopping uranium enrichment Removing enriched uranium from Iran Dismantling key nuclear facilities Deciding how much Iranian money will be unfrozen Reopening the Strait of Hormuz (ending fees) A regional security deal, including ending support for groups Source: Axios
text_zh: 美伊谈判的关键症结：停止铀浓缩；从伊朗移除浓缩铀；拆除关键核设施；决定解冻多少伊朗资金；重新开放霍尔木兹海峡（结束收费）；区域安全协议，包括停止对团体的支持。来源：Axios

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: A major oil trading loss has emerged amid the Iran war, with one of the world’s top traders suffering hundreds of millions of dollars in setbacks after betting incorrectly on market movements. A team led by a senior trader at Vitoil made large derivatives bets that assumed tensions would ease and prices would move in a certain direction. Instead, the war escalated and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz caused markets to swing sharply the opposite way. The losses ran into several hundred million dollars, though part of the losses has since been recovered and the firm remains profitable overall. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：在伊朗战争中出现了重大的石油交易损失，全球顶级交易商之一在错误押注市场走势后遭受了数亿美元的挫折。维托尔（Vitoil）的一位高级交易员领导的团队进行了大规模的衍生品押注，假设紧张局势会缓解，价格会向特定方向移动。相反，战争升级，霍尔木兹海峡的关闭导致市场向相反方向剧烈波动。损失达到数亿美元，尽管部分损失此后已收回，但该公司总体上仍保持盈利。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel 19 rocket and drone attacks launched by Hezbollah since this morning, estimating over 50, mostly unguided fire from Lebanon targeting civilian communities in northern Israel. At this pace, the IDF may not hold back from striking Hezbollah targets in Beirut. Waiting for a disaster to happen is a big risk to take. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）真主党自今天早上以来发动了19次火箭弹和无人机袭击，估计超过50次，大部分是从黎巴嫩发射的非制导火力，目标是以色列北部的平民社区。照此速度，以色列国防军可能不会再克制对贝鲁特真主党目标的打击。等待灾难发生是一个巨大的风险。推文

text: WarTranslated DeepState reports Russian forces advanced in Kharkiv and Donetsk regions near Veterinarne, Petropavlivka and Ivanopillia. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043362184479088862/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated DeepState报道称，俄罗斯军队在哈尔科夫和顿涅茨克地区的Veterinarne、Petropavlivka和Ivanopillia附近取得了进展。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043362184479088862/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @BarakRavid : A U.S. official details the main gaps in the talks with Iran: ☢️ Ending all uranium enrichment ☢️ Dismantle all major nuclear enrichment facilities (which are mostly destroyed) ☢️ Retrieve highly enriched uranium 📄 Accept a broader peace, security and de-escalation framework that includes regional allies 💰 End funding for terrorist proxies Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis 🚢 Fully open the Strait of Hormuz, charging no tolls for passage 💰 Another gap was the amount of Iranian frozen funds that will be released tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @BarakRavid：一位美国官员详细说明了与伊朗谈判的主要分歧：☢️ 结束所有铀浓缩 ☢️ 拆除所有主要的核浓缩设施（大部分已被摧毁） ☢️ 收回高浓缩铀 📄 接受一个更广泛的和平、安全和去升级框架，包括区域盟友 💰 结束对恐怖主义代理人哈马斯、真主党和胡塞武装的资助 🚢 完全开放霍尔木兹海峡，通行不收取过境费 💰 另一个分歧是将被释放的伊朗被冻结资金的数额。推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli Ambassador to UN Danny Danon: I was not surprised because I deal with the Iranians at the UN for years, and I see their attitude. They feel superior, superior to the U.S., to the Gulf countries, to Israel. You cannot fool President Trump https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043360958572089637/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列驻联合国大使丹尼·达农：我并不感到惊讶，因为我与伊朗人在联合国打交道多年，我看到了他们的态度。他们感到优越，优越于美国、海湾国家和以色列。你无法愚弄特朗普总统。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043360958572089637/video/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from 🇮🇪 Chay Bowes, The Irishman in Russia 🇷🇺: 🚨 I'm in Hungary for the election, its last chance saloon for common sense 🚨 So we take a look at the increasing lack of it across the World. Big Viktor is basically preventing WW3 here in Europe, but that doesn't stop Lindsey and Co trying to start it. Enjoy.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 🇮🇪 Chay Bowes，在俄罗斯的爱尔兰人 🇷🇺：🚨 我在匈牙利参加选举，这是常识的最后机会 🚨 所以我们来看看全世界日益缺乏常识的现象。大维克多（Viktor）基本上是在欧洲阻止第三次世界大战，但这并不能阻止林赛（Lindsey）等人试图发动战争。享受吧。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: A new report indicates that while the U.S. has severely degraded Iran’s conventional navy, Tehran still retains effective control over the Strait of Hormuz through a separate force. U.S. strikes destroyed a large portion of Iran’s regular navy, including major warships and vessels. However, the naval arm of the IRGC remains largely intact and continues to dominate the strategic waterway using small, fast-attack boats, drones, and sea mines. This force specialises in asymmetric warfare, allowing Iran to harass and restrict commercial shipping despite heavy military losses. Many of these smaller vessels are harder to target and are reportedly hidden along the coastline. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：一份新报告显示，虽然美国严重削弱了伊朗的常规海军，但德黑兰仍通过一支独立的部队保持着对霍尔木兹海峡的有效控制。美国的打击摧毁了伊朗正规海军的很大一部分，包括主要军舰和船只。然而，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的海军部门基本完好无损，并继续使用小型快速攻击艇、无人机和水雷控制着这一战略水道。这支部队擅长非对称作战，使伊朗尽管遭受了沉重的军事损失，仍能骚扰和限制商业航运。这些小型船只中的许多更难成为目标，据报道隐藏在海岸线沿线。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区的纳哈里亚及周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 Saudi Arabia has summoned the Iraqi ambassador in Riyadh Safia Taleb Al Souhail over continued drone attacks originating from Iraqi territory targeting the kingdom and other Gulf states. A formal diplomatic protest note was handed over. The kingdom stressed that Iraq must act responsibly, and that Saudi Arabia will take all necessary measures to defend its security. The move marks the first Saudi acknowledgement that it has been attacked by pro‑Iranian Iraqi militias, not only by Iran itself. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 沙特阿拉伯就源自伊拉克领土、针对沙特王国和其他海湾国家的持续无人机袭击，召见了伊拉克驻利雅得大使萨菲亚·塔勒布·阿尔·苏海尔。一份正式的外交抗议照会已递交。沙特王国强调，伊拉克必须采取负责任的行动，沙特阿拉伯将采取一切必要措施捍卫其安全。此举标志着沙特首次承认其不仅受到伊朗本身的攻击，还受到亲伊朗的伊拉克民兵的攻击。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Times : The CIA used the Israeli Pegasus spyware in a deception operation inside Iran during an attempt to rescue a downed American pilot. The pilot’s F-15E was shot down by an Iranian shoulder-fired missile. As part of the effort, the CIA allegedly used the Israeli-made software to send fake messages to Iranian leadership and IRGC operatives, claiming the missing officer had already been located. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《泰晤士报》：中央情报局在试图营救一名被击落的美国飞行员期间，在伊朗境内的一次欺骗行动中使用了以色列的飞马（Pegasus）间谍软件。这名飞行员的F-15E被伊朗的肩扛式导弹击落。作为行动的一部分，据称中央情报局使用了以色列制造的软件向伊朗领导层和伊斯兰革命卫队人员发送虚假信息，声称失踪的军官已经被找到。@wfwitness

The IDF has encircled the town in recent days to clear it of alleged Hezbollah members. text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Tehran's Judiciary: Assets of Iran International General Manager Seized 34 valuable assets belonging to Mahmoud Enayat , General Manager of the Mossad-linked propaganda news network Iran International. The seized properties include plots of land, several farms, houses, apartments, garden plots, one factory, and more. These were identified through precise intelligence monitoring and blocked under laws against espionage and cooperation with the Zionist regime and hostile countries.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 德黑兰司法部门：伊朗国际电视台（Iran International）总经理资产被查封。属于与摩萨德有关联的宣传新闻网络伊朗国际电视台总经理马哈茂德·埃纳亚特（Mahmoud Enayat）的34项宝贵资产被查封。被查封的财产包括土地、几处农场、房屋、公寓、花园地块、一家工厂等。这些资产是通过精确的情报监控确定的，并根据反间谍法以及与犹太复国主义政权和敌对国家合作的法律被冻结。

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Hezbollah releases footage of a strike drone targeting Israeli occupation soldiers positioned in the town of Taybeh, southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 真主党发布了打击无人机瞄准黎巴嫩南部塔耶贝（Taybeh）镇以色列占领军士兵的画面。

text: 🇮🇷 IRGC Navy in first reaction to Trump's statements following collapse of Islamabad talks: "Any wrong step in the Strait of Hormuz will put the enemy in deadly whirlpools." An American destroyer left the Strait after receiving a warning from the Iranian Navy. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军对特朗普在伊斯兰堡谈判破裂后发表声明的首次回应：“在霍尔木兹海峡的任何错误举动都将使敌人陷入致命的漩涡。”一艘美国驱逐舰在收到伊朗海军警告后离开了海峡。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
